claimguard.about.page.title: ClaimGuard
claimguard.about.title: ClaimGuard fraud review
claimguard.about.body: ClaimGuard scores every submitted claim for fraud risk and surfaces plain-language reasons to a human reviewer before payment. Open a claim in the Claims module to link it directly to its ClaimGuard risk review, or open the reviewer dashboard below.
claimguard.ClaimGuardPanel.title: ClaimGuard fraud review
claimguard.home.title: ClaimGuard — AI fraud review for claims
claimguard.home.titleError: ClaimGuard — AI fraud protection for claims
claimguard.home.body: Every claim submitted into openIMIS can be scored for fraud risk by ClaimGuard, the companion reviewer dashboard. ClaimGuard flags amount anomalies, near-duplicate claims, cross-facility patient patterns, and provider outliers — with plain-language reasons — so a human reviewer can act before payment is released. The summary below is live from ClaimGuard; open a claim's detail page to link it directly, or open the full reviewer dashboard for the entire queue.
